sessions.lastAssistantMessage: {"planUpdate":{"decisions":["Use JWT with refresh tokens (Access: 15min, Refresh: 7d)","Store refresh tokens in httpOnly cookie","Use bcrypt (cost 12) for password hashing"],"completedStepIds":["step-login-endpoint"],"newSteps":[{"id":"step-refresh-token","description":"Implement POST /auth/refresh endpoint","status":"pending"},{"id":"step-logout","description":"Implement POST /auth/logout with token revocation","status":"pending"}],"issues":[]},"memoryUpdate":{"facts":[{"text":"POST /login accepts email+password, returns access token in body and refresh token in httpOnly cookie","topic":"login-api-spec"},{"text":"bcrypt cost factor 12 chosen for balance of security and response time (<300ms)","topic":"security"}],"decisions":[{"text":"JWT access tokens expire in 15 minutes; refresh tokens valid 7 days","topic":"jwt-strategy","replacesTopic":true},{"text":"Refresh tokens stored server-side in Redis for instant revocation capability","topic":"token-storage"}],"forbidden":[{"text":"Stateless JWT without server-side token tracking","topic":"jwt-strategy","rationale":"Cannot revoke individual tokens without server-side storage"}],"invalidations":[{"matchText":"Old JWT without refresh","reason":"Superseded by JWT+refresh implementation decision"},{"matchTopic":"auth-api-strategy","reason":"API A strategy replaced by direct JWT implementation"}]},"resultSummary":"Successfully implemented POST /login endpoint with bcrypt password verification and JWT issuance. Access tokens (15min) returned in response body. Refresh tokens (7d) set as httpOnly cookie. bcrypt cost=12 verified <300ms on target hardware."}
addedKnowledge: POST /login accepts email+password, returns access token in body and refresh token in httpOnly cookie
bcrypt cost factor 12 chosen for balance of security and response time (<300ms)
JWT access tokens expire in 15 minutes; refresh tokens valid 7 days
Refresh tokens stored server-side in Redis for instant revocation capability
Stateless JWT without server-side token tracking
